intelligence.summary: Follow-up meeting titled 'bring procurement' is scheduled Apr 30 with Eleanor and James Okoye both accepted — first time James is included.
Maria Chen (CFO, economic buyer) has no logged conversational touch and is absent from all scheduled meetings. Inferred from zero activity records linking Maria to this opportunity.
Carlos Vega (IT Director, influencer) is account-only, not on the deal, has no logged touches and no engagement/disposition signals. Inferred from source='account_only' and null engagement fields.

Eleanor has initiated or accepted every deal touch (email response, discovery call, Apr 30 meeting), indicating she is the active internal driver. Inferred from her presence across all three deal activities.
No quantified business metrics (cost, time, headcount savings) were captured on the discovery call. Inferred from absence of any metrics-category key moments in the Gong call record.
No explicit decision criteria (requirements, evaluation scorecard, vendor selection criteria) were discussed on the discovery call. Inferred from absence of decision_criteria-category key moments.
No competitive vendors mentioned during discovery call. Inferred from absence of competition-category key moments or topics in Gong record.
No paper/contract process details (legal review, signature authority, procurement cycle) were discussed on the discovery call. Inferred from absence of relevant key moments.

James Okoye's last_conversational_confirmation_at is null — he has never spoken directly with the rep. His first inclusion is the scheduled Apr 30 meeting. Inferred from null confirmation field and activity records.
Deal is at stage 2 of 8 (Discovery) with a close date of 2026-07-31, providing approximately 3 months from current stage to expected close.
Eleanor's committee role is formally designated 'champion' in the CRM and her deal_disposition is set to 'champion' — consistent with her observed behavior as primary internal driver.

James has never spoken with the rep (null conversational confirmation). Invited to Apr 30 meeting which he accepted — first direct engagement. Current disposition cannot be confirmed.
Maria Chen (CFO / economic buyer) has no logged touches, no meeting invitations, and no conversational confirmation. Only referenced by Eleanor on the discovery call as a required approver.
Pat BDR originated the deal via cold outreach and organized the Apr 30 meeting. Internal rep — disposition as 'neutral' reflects internal party classification.
Carlos Vega (IT Director) is account-only, not on the deal, with no touches logged. Influence level cannot be assessed from available data.

conflicts.description: Eleanor is designated champion (medium influence) but economic buyer Maria Chen (high influence, CFO) has zero engagement. Eleanor has not demonstrated access to or pull with the EB — champion designation is unvalidated.
CRM deal_posture is 'advancing' but economic buyer is absent, champion influence is medium (not high), metrics/criteria/competition pillars are unknown. Posture may be overstated.

last_activity_summary.text: A follow-up video meeting titled 'bring procurement' is scheduled for Apr 30, 2026, with Eleanor Beneba and James Okoye (Procurement) both accepted — the first time James is included in a deal touch.

deal_posture.rationale: Active champion (Eleanor) driving engagement; procurement (James) now being introduced. However, EB (Maria/CFO) is fully absent and champion influence is medium — progress is fragile without EB access.

diagnostics.rationale: Deal is at early Discovery (stage 2/8). Only one substantive call transcript exists. Five of eight MEDDPICC pillars lack evidence (metrics, decision_criteria, paper_process, competition) or are only partially confirmed. The economic buyer has zero direct engagement. Multiple stakeholders have no conversational history. Champion status is CRM-designated but behaviorally unvalidated beyond basic responsiveness.
